summary.rule: high = size<=25 AND shared 2-char prefix; low = otherwise
summary.behavior: ALL groups redistributed (workers split equally). low-confidence groups are flagged for human audit; if a low group is a coincidental workers collision, manually override in build_data.py with an explicit keep-raw map.
